author: Naetty
description: Switch Miku-inspired theme modes and optional dashboard widgets with built-in hybrid styling. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Nattaya Buck
manifest.description: Switch Miku-inspired theme modes and optional dashboard widgets with built-in hybrid styling.
manifest.name: Miku Hybrid

name: Miku Hybrid

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Update ASCII art and quote rotation text
- Lower minimum quote rotation interval from 10s to 5s
- Fix reduced-motion toggle for widget animations and transitions
- Fix corrupted `package-lock.json` that blocked release CI builds

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Public release for the Obsidian Community plugin directory.

### Features
- Miku-inspired theme modes: MinimalMiku, Concert, NightNeon, SnowMiku
- Optional dashboard, status bar, banner, quote, and profile widgets
- Bundled hybrid CSS in `styles.css` (no separate Appearance theme required)
- Reduced-motion support and adjustable glow intensity

### Notes
- Strict no-audio policy (no audio assets or APIs)
- Fan-inspired visuals and original ASCII motifs only

### Install
Settings → Community plugins → Browse → **Miku Hybrid** → Install → Enable.
